chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-82 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 256/23 3.For hearing of main case 11-12-2023 Mr. Abdul Raheem Ansari, Advocate for petitioner. ***** learned counsel submits that petitioner is complainant in crime No.10 of 2023, registered at P.S, Airport-Sukkur under sections 302, 395, 148 & 149 PPC and accused are police officials, who are not being arrested by the police despite Challan being submitted and NBWs issued against them. Be that as it may, the petitioner has a remedy before the trial Court which is already seized of the matter. He should approach the trial Court for this purpose and the trial Court must exercise its jurisdiction in accordance with law to procure attendance of the accused. Petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
